name: ⌞ SHADOW SPECS ⌝
description:
⚡ — "We'll make you into morons too!"

IN WHICH - Before you and your team manage to save lil' Judd, you have to fight off Shadow Specs...and his many copies...

SPLATOON - COROIKA

This guy is a damn idiot. I really missed the shadow characters in the manga - and even though I was happy to see them again - their cameo was WAY too short...💔

This guy is nuts — also I had to invent a bit of his personality cause this guy appeared for a few chapters and all I can remember that he said is 'ueheh' or something like that - also it's not the best and most creative intro I wrote so forgive me💔

REQUESTED
creator: Marinevxk
